publishedAbstract: * Any attempt to create a new PVC with a `storageClass` (i.e. glusterfs-storage-block) backed by GlusterFS Block Storage fails with a `No space` error message. * There seems to be much more capacity available than requested with PersistentVolumeClaim (check i.e. with `heketi-cli topology info`) * Even creating a very small volume (i.e. 1 Gig) fails with `failed to provision volume with StorageClass "glusterfs-storage-block": failed to create volume: heketi block volume creation failed: [heketi] failed to create volume: Failed to allocate new block volume: No space` * Need to change the size of newly created block_hosting volumes after deployment of OCS
publishedTitle: No space error when provisioning GlusterFS block volume
